extraction_summary.translation_status: Chinese translation mirrors English equations and numbering

unresolved_issues: Source Table 1 has OCR artifacts in the SWGK equations for leverage and the Lambda/mu note.
Shock AR(1) process equations are implementation cross-check evidence because the main paper text does not print them individually.
Rep-MMB shifts equation 18b forward and changes equation 19 capital timing; future runnable implementation needs a timing decision.
No Dynare runtime validation was performed.
